channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network From Far Away TV Anime的 预告 Video 公开 Main 声优阵容 & 制作阵容 Members, October 4 Debut
item.description: Tomoyo Kurosawa, Kentarō Kumagai, Yūichirō Umehara, Eiji Takeuchi star in Studio Deen anime ― The official website for the television anime anime of Kyouko Hikawa's From Far Away (Kanata Kara) shōjo... | 来源: ANN | 原文: From Far Away TV Anime's Teaser Video Reveals Main Cast & Staff Members, October 4 Debut

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Flaming Dodgeball Girl Danko 动画 Casts Noriko Hidaka, Misato Fukuen
item.description: Hidaka plays Danko's mother Misato, Fukuen plays Danko's grandmother Haruka ― The second episode of Flaming Dodgeball Girl Danko, the television anime of Tetsuhiro Koshita's Honō no Tōkyūjo: Dodge... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Flaming Dodgeball Girl Danko Anime Casts Noriko Hidaka, Misato Fukuen

item.title: [PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] MyAnimeList Kanata kara 公开 Main 声优阵容, 制作阵容, 预告 宣传视频 Fall 2026
item.description: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kyouko Hikawa's Kanata kara (From Far Away) manga unveiled the main cast, staff, teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video on... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Kanata kara' Unveils Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for Fall 2026

item.description: The official website for the new Koukaku Kidoutai (The Ghost in the Shell) television anime announced the main cast on Tuesday. The new TV anime premiered on Tuesday at 11:00 p.m. on Kansai TV and... | 来源: MAL | 原文: New 'Ghost in the Shell' TV Anime Announces Main Cast

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Mononoke Gets 新作 动画 Project
item.description: Production company Twin Engine announced that a new project in the Mononoke anime series is in production on Sunday. Actor Hirofumi Araki (Tennis no Oujisama), who played the Medicine Seller in the... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Mononoke' Gets New Anime Project
